user.title: Univers EMS (iStore Solar)
user.description: Enter your Univers EMS portal credentials.

data.asset_id: Asset ID (from portal URL — e.g. a1b2c3d4)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Univers EMS portal. Check your internet connection.

send_forced_control.name: Send Forced Control
send_forced_control.description: Sends staged forced charge/discharge settings to the inverter. Only parameters that have changed from the current API state are sent. Set the desired values on the Forced Mode, Forced Charge Power, Forced Discharge Power, and/or Forced Period entities first, then call this service to commit them.
